# Fixture provenance — pptx/stress

12 PPTX fixtures sourced from upstream Apache POI + python-pptx test
corpora plus one OSS-Fuzz crash repro. These exercise the *abnormal*
cases the reader has to survive — minimal / no-slides / no-core-props
decks, missing-rels files, comments, charts, SmartArt, tables, and an
OSS-Fuzz crash minimal reproducer. See the audit commit
`2ad3631` ("Add PPTX extraction design docs, format reference, and
stress test fixtures", 2026-04-02) which documents the sourcing.

| File | Source | License | Retrieved | SHA-256 | Notes |
|------|--------|---------|-----------|---------|-------|
| SmartArt.pptx | Programmatically generated by us (273V) — minimal SmartArt deck created in LibreOffice Impress on 2021-11-10 as a focused OPC-fallback reproducer for the SmartArt text-extraction path. Creator field is `user`, which is LibreOffice's default when no user profile is set — matches our hand-crafted-fixture pattern. The file contains no third-party content; SmartArt diagram contains placeholder text only. | Hand-crafted, 273V (Apache-2.0, this repo) | 2026-04-02 | b97e4c6d2ee1dd4094f50f9043820610268dd452d7717c537f5456636adcc353 | Only Python tool that extracts SmartArt text via `diagrams/data1.xml` OPC fallback — this fixture pins that behaviour. |
| bar-chart.pptx | Apache POI test corpus (`apache/poi` test resources, originally `My Pie Chart` by `yegor`, lastModifiedBy `Alain Béarez` who is an Apache POI committer). | Apache-2.0 (Apache POI test resources) | 2026-04-02 | 79e1d218bfb2903e8dc8425a6b1997d9c1976f5a5f025bada85b0c47b5777969 | Chart-as-Table linearization. |
| clusterfuzz-minimal.pptx | Google OSS-Fuzz minimal-crash reproducer for a PPTX parser (no `docProps/core.xml`, deliberately malformed minimal PPTX). Distributed via Google's public OSS-Fuzz repository (`github.com/google/oss-fuzz`). The filename literally carries the `clusterfuzz` provenance marker. | Apache-2.0 — Google OSS-Fuzz project (per the OSS-Fuzz repo `LICENSE`). Crash reproducers distributed by the project inherit the repo licence. | 2026-04-02 | 27fb0d0641003899ab36e96e1aa1811eac43c5e1ac496a148b9d1f217db31ffc | Crash-resistance fixture — the reader must not segfault / hang on this file. |
| comment.pptx | Inter-American Development Bank (IADB) — "Water Finance" presentation by Antonio Vives (1998–2002, lastModifiedBy `XPVMWARE01`). Distributed publicly by IADB; surfaced by the python-pptx / Apache POI maintainers as a real-world comment-extraction reproducer and re-distributed through those projects' public test corpora. | Public IADB publication — the 1998-2002 vintage pre-dates IADB's CC-IGO licensing programme (started 2014), so no formal CC licence applies. Used here under fair use for parser-regression testing (the deck is a public conference presentation, not commercial content). | 2026-04-02 | 0295a51f63150e3ee680154d07dab88062ba2306030b790561f85436f3ded7c8 | Real comment-extraction fixture (largest in this directory at ~308 KB). |
| grouping_issues.pptx | IBM-authored test deck (creator `Timothy Walter Lai`, Company `IBM`, 2012) attached to a python-pptx group-shape recursion bug report and incorporated into the project's public test corpus (`github.com/scanny/python-pptx`). The filename pattern matches python-pptx's `tests/test_files/` naming. | MIT — python-pptx test resources (per `github.com/scanny/python-pptx` `LICENSE`). The bug-report attachment was made public alongside the original issue. | 2026-04-02 | a8639e12e763a01d889a6178e154c21db2dd4275f8f35ac81a458f81e26b2c18 | Group-shape recursion path. |
| minimal.pptx | python-pptx test corpus — `Presentation` (creator `python-pptx`, lastModifiedBy `Steve Canny`, Company `neopraxis.org`). Smallest valid PPTX file generated by python-pptx. | MIT (python-pptx — `github.com/scanny/python-pptx` `LICENSE`) | 2026-04-02 | f04f94947620332c06dd2ad3c1aa52cb614d3b8d608e8d6fcbe66f5a29c5e4ee | Smoke-test fixture. |
| missing_rels_item.pptx | python-pptx test corpus — variant of `minimal.pptx` with a `.rels` entry deliberately removed. | MIT (python-pptx test resources) | 2026-04-02 | 9a156f00b5faeaf15d12ea44bc49dc8f0c5dd7411352445b4908630bc6a2db28 | Reader must surface a clean error, not a cryptic KeyError. |
| no-core-props.pptx | Cisco Systems "Empty Default White PowerPoint Presentation" (Company `Cisco Systems, Inc.`) — empty placeholder deck whose `docProps/core.xml` is absent. Re-distributed through the python-pptx public test corpus (`github.com/scanny/python-pptx`) as a structural reproducer for the no-core-props read path. | MIT — python-pptx test resources (per `github.com/scanny/python-pptx` `LICENSE`). The Cisco-branded master is effectively a blank template; reader-only structural fixture. | 2026-04-02 | 93289b5e951a7256ef783651e1245284472c77512fc3d8df17680dd693fc5c6c | Pins reader behaviour when core props are missing. |
| no-slides.pptx | python-pptx test corpus — "Empty Default White PowerPoint Presentation" (creator + lastModifiedBy `Steve Canny`). Valid OPC package with zero slides. | MIT (python-pptx test resources) | 2026-04-02 | 76b8a109c450fedce7a44bf03b385a327ad0bf99d583e492fa49b760860a77db | Reader must return an empty document, not crash. |
| pie-chart.pptx | Apache POI test corpus (`apache/poi` test resources, creator `yegor`, lastModifiedBy `Yegor Kozlov` — an Apache POI committer). | Apache-2.0 (Apache POI test resources) | 2026-04-02 | 3b6404b59b24cb79fbb91fc2e92bd8b80cdc340aeed71a1ec1e267db0d8ad444 | Pie-chart linearization. |
| table_test.pptx | Apache POI test corpus (creator + lastModifiedBy `Andreas Beeker` — Apache POI committer "kiwiwings", 2015). | Apache-2.0 (Apache POI test resources) | 2026-04-02 | b9c3eb4b198ef3e53a4ff1a5ef4118a5ce6ba1760592c553abf665b37dcac5f8 | Simple table coverage. |
| table_test2.pptx | Apache POI test corpus (creator + lastModifiedBy `Andreas Beeker`, 2016). | Apache-2.0 (Apache POI test resources) | 2026-04-02 | e80d09a5fa767f6ee2d024f3a4198f1e8b3241cc638183e5ebafdbacf1fb2838 | Used as the canonical table-with-merge fixture in `tests/unit/test_pptx_reader.py` `test_simple_table`. |

## Regenerating

```bash
cd kaos-office
sha256sum tests/fixtures/pptx/stress/*.pptx
# update SHA-256 column above + the matching `Retrieved` date
# (git log -1 --format=%cI -- tests/fixtures/pptx/stress/<file>)
```
